hero.lede: A ripperdoc once enhanced the body with cybernetics. We enhance the mind — with AI, intelligent systems and automation that make one person capable of what once took a team.
manifesto.lead: In the Cyberpunk universe, a ripperdoc didn't just heal — he upgraded the person. He fitted eyes that saw more, sharpened reflexes and memory, and opened a way past biological limits. He was the gateway to crossing your own boundaries.
manifesto.quote: If cybernetic implants enhanced the body, intelligence enhances the mind.
manifesto.body1: A modern ripperdoc does not install cybernetic eyes. They help people see more through data, think faster through AI, and remember through knowledge systems.
manifesto.body2: Today that role belongs to specialists in artificial intelligence, automation and knowledge systems. They give people tools that let one person do what once took a whole team — without surrendering judgment or control.
manifesto.body3: We design those augmentations — quietly, precisely, and always in service of the person using them. Because technology is the augmentation; the human stays the hero.
services.title: Technology around the human — never in their place.
services.sub: Every engagement layers intelligence onto the person who stays in the centre.
pillar1.p: AI agents and decision-support that let a person reason over more information, faster — without surrendering judgment.
pillar2.p: Connected systems and automation that remember, coordinate and act — turning intent into executed work.
pillar3.p: The instruments and infrastructure that ground intelligence in the physical world, reliably and at scale.
work.title: Your training, amplified.
work.body: RipperSync turns VR sessions (Meta Quest 3) and health data into one unified picture — read through a private AI coach on your own infrastructure. You train; the system measures, remembers and advises.
work.note: Health data is sensitive — so RipperSync runs self-hosted on your own NAS or VPS, keeping it under your control. Integrations (examples): Oura and Withings via Health Connect. Planned for later versions: a voice agent (ElevenLabs).
work.stack: Kotlin · Jetpack Compose · MCP · Meta Quest 3
proof.title: Capability, measured.
contact.title: What could you do, augmented?
contact.body: Start with a diagnostic session. Together we map where you lose time, focus and momentum — then design an augmentation built around you: agents, automation and knowledge systems that take the repetitive off your plate and give the space back to the work only you can do. We don't replace people — we extend what you already do well.
